title: Madeon - Pop Culture (live mashup)
notes: 39 songs mashed live on a Launchpad. Viral 2011 video, 60M+ views.

title: Numb/Encore
notes: From Collision Course EP. Grammy-winning mashup of Numb and Encore.

title: Points of Authority / 99 Problems / One Step Closer
notes: Triple mashup from Collision Course EP.

title: United State of Pop 2009 (Blame It on the Pop)
notes: Top 25 Billboard hits of 2009 mashed together.

title: Girl Talk - Oh No (Feed the Animals)
notes: Opening track from Feed the Animals (2008). Dense sample collage.

notes: From Feed the Animals. Mixes classic rock with hip-hop vocals.

title: Girl Talk - This Is the Remix (All Day)
notes: From All Day (2010). 373 samples across the full album.

title: Encore (Grey Album)
notes: Jay-Z's Black Album vocals over Beatles White Album samples.

title: United State of Pop 2008 (Viva la Pop)
notes: Top 25 hits of 2008 built on Coldplay's Viva la Vida backbone.

title: Girl Talk - Set It Off (Feed the Animals)
notes: From Feed the Animals. Classic rock and hip-hop blend.

Dirt Off Your Shoulder / Lying from You
